sources.label: Get Information About Schools (GIAS)
sources.coverage: All schools and educational establishments in England
sources.description: The definitive national register of every school in England. Used for school names, addresses, phase, establishment type and BNG coordinates. Updated daily; date of export is embedded in the download URL.

sources.label: Ofsted State-Funded Schools Inspection Outcomes
sources.publisher: Ofsted (Office for Standards in Education, Children's Services and Skills)
sources.coverage: All state-funded schools inspected in England (rolling 5-year window)
sources.description: Five-year rolling Ofsted inspection results for state-funded schools. Provides the headline grade (Outstanding/Good/Requires improvement/Inadequate) and the published inspection date for each school.
notes: ofsted: downloaded and converted from ODS (https://assets.publishing.service.gov.uk/media/67ea6bdef0edd954a99fe925/five-year-ofsted-inspection-data_state-funded-schools.ods)

sources.label: KS4 (GCSE) School Performance Tables
sources.update_frequency: Annual (revised data published each January for previous academic year)
sources.coverage: Secondary and all-through state-funded schools in England
sources.description: Annual school-level GCSE outcomes. Includes Progress 8 (value-added measure), Attainment 8 (average grade score across 8 GCSEs), and the percentage of pupils achieving grade 4+ (standard pass) and grade 5+ (strong pass) in English and Maths.
notes: KS4 input disabled in config (ks4_input.enabled: false).

sources.label: KS5 (A-Level) School Performance Tables
sources.update_frequency: Annual (published October/November for previous academic year)
sources.coverage: Schools and sixth-form colleges in England
sources.description: Annual school-level A-level outcomes for schools with sixth forms. Includes average point score per entry, percentage of A*/A grades, A*–E pass rate, and total number of A-level students aged 16–18.
notes: KS5 input disabled in config (ks5_input.enabled: false).
